---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest an improvement aligned with the mission
title: '[Feature] '
labels: enhancement
---

## Problem / motivation

What problem does this solve for owners, finders, shelters, vets, or operators?

## Proposed solution

What you'd like to happen.

## Alignment check

- [ ] Keeps core reunification features free
- [ ] Preserves privacy (no new plaintext PII; no owner exposure from a chip number)
- [ ] Avoids vendor lock-in (external services behind a provider interface)

## Alternatives considered

Other approaches you thought about.
